hausa.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Kashe kudin gida kan kayayyaki da ayyuka. Babbar sashe na GDP.
hausa.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Kashe kudin kasuwanci kan kayan jari, sabon gine-gine, da canje-canjen kaya.
hausa.government_spending_on_goods_and_servi: Kashe kudin gwamnati kan kayayyaki da ayyuka (ban da tallafi kamar tsaron zamantakewa).
hausa.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: Fitarwa ban da shigowa. A halin yanzu korau ga Amurka (gibin ciniki).
hausa.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: Canjin kaso a cikin GDP na ainihi. 2-3% lafiya ce.
hausa.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Yana auna matsakaicin canje-canjen farashi. Babban ma'aunin hauhawar farashi.
hausa.percent_of_labor_force_without_jobs_na: Kaso na ma'aikata ba tare da aiki ba. Yawan halitta kusan 4%.
hausa.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Ribar da bankuna ke caji juna. Babban kayan aikin Fed.
hausa.index_of_500_large_us_companies_proxy_: Ma'aunin manyan kamfanoni 500 na Amurka. Wakilin kasuwar hannun jari.
hausa.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Binciken yadda mabukata ke da kwarin gwiwa kan tattalin arziki.
hausa.number_of_new_residential_construction: Adadin sabbin ayyukan gina gidajen zama da aka fara.
hausa.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: Fitarwa ban da shigowa. Rara = tabbatacce, gibi = korau.
hausa.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Jimillar aron gwamnati. Bashin Amurka kusan $34 tiriliyan (2024).
hausa.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Yana zana yawan riba akan lokacin balagar shaida. Juyawa = alamar koma baya.
hausa.measures_income_inequality_0_perfect_e: Yana auna rashin daidaiton kudin shiga. 0 = cikakken daidaito, 1 = mafi girman rashin daidaito.
hausa.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Sanannen tsari mai sauki na kasafin kudi.
hausa.save_a_fixed_percentage_before_spendin: Ajiye kaso maras canzawa kafin kashe kudi kan wani abu.
hausa.every_dollar_gets_assigned_a_job_incom: Kowanne dala ana ba shi aiki. Kudin shiga ban da kashewa = sifili daidai.
hausa.what_should_you_do_first: Me ya kamata ka fara yi?
hausa.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Me ya sa bukatar man fetur ba ta ragu kamar yadda kake tsammani ba?
hausa.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Me ya sa daga yawan riba ke cutar da hannun jari?
hausa.which_country_has_comparative_advantag: Wace kasa ce ke da fa'ida kwatankwaci a kwamfutoci?
hausa.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Menene tasirin dogon lokaci mafi yiwuwa?
hausa.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Menene ainihin farashin makarantar digiri na biyu?
hausa.what_economic_consequence_followed_in_: Wace sakamako ta tattalin arziki ta biyo baya a 2021-2022?
hausa.what_will_the_other_station_likely_do: Me tashar man fetur din ta biyu za ta iya yi?
hausa.what_type_of_market_failure_is_this: Wace irin gazawar kasuwa ce wannan?
hausa.how_much_should_you_contribute_at_mini: Nawa ya kamata ka bayar a mafi karanci?
hausa.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Farashi na tashi ← karancin bukata, karin wadata. Farashi na sauka ← karin bukata, karancin wadata. Daidaito: inda wadata ke haduwa da bukata.
hausa.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X−M). Cin kaya + Saka jari + Gwamnati + Fitarwa ta ainihi. Yana auna jimillar samar da tattalin arziki.
hausa.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Jan bukata: kudi da yawa suna bin kayayyaki. Turin farashi: farashin samarwa yana tashi. Na cikin gida: tsammanin zagayen albashi-farashi.
hausa.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Yawan riba (FFR) • Ayyukan kasuwa a bude (saye/sayar da shaida) • Bukatun ajiya • Tagar rangwame • Jagora na gaba
hausa.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Haraji = Majalisa (haraji/kashe kudi). Kudi = Fed (yawan riba/wadatar kudi). Dukansu suna tasiri kan tattalin arziki ta hanyoyi daban-daban.
hausa.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: Raba 72 da yawan riba don gano shekaru nawa kudinka za su ninka. 72 ÷ 8% = shekaru 9 don ninkawa.
hausa.elastic_1_luxury_has_substitutes_inela: Mai sassauci (>1): alatu, akwai madadi. Maras sassauci (<1): bukata, babu madadi. Sassauci na naúra (=1): % canjin P = % canjin Q.
hausa.perfect_competition_monopolistic_compe: Cikakkiyar gasa ← Gasar mallakar kai ← Oligopoly ← Mallakar kai. Karin karfin kasuwa = karin farashi, karancin inganci.
hausa.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Jadawalin wadata-bukata yana nuna bukata, wadata, farashin daidaito, adadin daidaito, rara, karanci, da tasirin haraji.
hausa.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Jadawalin kudi na sirri yana nuna kasafin wata a matsayin jadawalin kek da hasashen ci gaban riba mai hadewa.
hausa.canvas_summary_stock_market: Jadawalin kasuwar hannun jari yana nuna tarihin farashin kamfanin da aka zaba, kudin fayil, mallaka, da darajar yanzu.
hausa.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Yankin jadawalin hannun jari a shirye don kasuwar da aka kirkira. Fara kwaikwayon kasuwa don ganin tarihin farashi da mallaka.
hausa.canvas_summary_entrepreneur: Zanen kwaikwayon kasuwanci yana nuna yanayi, farashin rumfar lemun tsami, kudi, farashi, matsayin daidaito, da tarihin riba.
hausa.canvas_summary_macro: Allon sarrafa tattalin arzikin kasa yana nuna ci gaban GDP, hauhawar farashi, yawan riba, yawan rashin aikin yi, ma'aunin ciniki, da tarihin manufa.
hausa.canvas_summary_inquiry: Yanayin binciken manufa yana amfani da lefofi hudu na manufa don kwaikwayon sakamako mai sauki na macro. Yi amfani da sandunan manufa a kasa don kwatanta canje-canje a GDP, hauhawar farashi, da rashin aikin yi.
hausa.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Ka sa dalibai su yi hasashen ko farashi, adadi, rara, ko karanci na canjawa kafin motsa mai zamewa.
hausa.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Ka sa dalibai su fadi wani sassauci a kasafin kudi da dalili daya me ya sa fara riba mai hadewa da wuri ke ba da lada.
hausa.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Ka sa dalibai su raba motsin farashi, tushen kasuwanci, da hadarin fayil a cikin bayani daya.
hausa.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Ka sa dalibai su kiyasta adadin kofuna don daidaito kafin bude kasuwanci na yini daya.
hausa.teacher_prompt_macro: Ka sa dalibai su zabi manufa daya da gano ma'aunin da zai nuna ci gaba ko cutarwa.
hausa.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Ka tambayi dalibai wace lefar manufa masana tattalin arziki za su fi jayayya a kanta, sannan su bayyana me ya sa modeli kiyasi ne kawai.
hausa.supply_demand_the_price_discovery_engi: Wadata da bukata — injin gano farashi
hausa.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Bukata na sauka (arha = saya kari); wadata na hawa (tsada = samar da kari). Farashi da adadin daidaito suna inda suke haduwa. «Wadatar Al'ummomi» (1776) na Adam Smith har yanzu tushe ne.
hausa.personal_finance_budgeting_saving_cred: Kudi na sirri — kasafin kudi, tanadi, bashi
hausa.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: bukatu / sha'awa / tanadi. Riba mai hadewa mu'ujiza ta takwas ce; a 7%, fara shekaru 30 da wuri yana mai da $1 zuwa $7.61. Biya katin bashi cikakke — riba 19%/shekara yawan cin riba ne.
hausa.stock_market_ownership_at_fractional_s: Kasuwar hannun jari — mallaka a matakin kaso
hausa.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Saya hannun jari daya = mallaki wani yanki na kamfani. S&P 500 ya ba da matsakaicin riba kusan 10%/shekara cikin shekaru 100. Bambanta (kada ka caca kan hannun jari daya), rike na dogon lokaci (lokaci a kasuwa ya fi kiyasta lokacin kasuwa).
hausa.business_sim_you_re_the_founder: Kayan kwaikwayon kasuwanci — kai ne wanda ya kafa
hausa.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Kudin shiga − farashi = riba. Matsayin daidaito shine lokacin da aka biya farashi masu tsayawa. Yawancin kananan kasuwanci suna fadi a shekara ta 5; wadanda suka tsira sun sami daidaiton kaya-kasuwa. Farashin samun abokin ciniki (CAC) da darajar rayuwa (LTV) sune lissafin yau da kullun na wanda ya kafa.
hausa.national_economy_gdp_inflation_unemplo: Tattalin arzikin kasa — GDP, hauhawar farashi, rashin aikin yi
hausa.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP yana auna jimillar samarwa; Ma'aunin Farashin Mabukaci yana auna hauhawar farashi; rashin aikin yi yana amfani da U-3 a matsayin tushe. Fed yana saita yawan riba don daidaita ci gaba da hauhawar farashi — wannan aiki biyu ne da Majalisa ta ba shi a 1977.
hausa.reference_tool_group: Kayan aikin nassi na tattalin arziki
hausa.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Yi wasan kwaikwayo don gano ra'ayoyin tattalin arziki! Kowanne lamari yana koyar da sabon ra'ayi kuma ana kara shi a nan.
hausa.ask_any_economics_question: Tambayi kowace tambaya ta tattalin arziki...
hausa.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Duba yadda hauhawar farashi ke lalata karfin saye a kan lokaci. Dala daya na yau ya fi darajar dala daya na gobe!
hausa.the_economy_moves_through_repeating_cy: Tattalin arziki yana motsi ta hanyar zagayen fadada da raguwa masu maimaituwa. Fahimtar inda muke a cikin zagayen yana taimaka wa hasashen mataki na gaba.
hausa.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: «Riba mai hadewa ita ce mu'ujiza ta takwas ta duniya.» — Albert Einstein (ana cewa)
hausa.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Masana tattalin arziki ba su yarda ba! Makarantu daban-daban suna ba da amsoshi daban-daban ga tambayoyi iri daya. Fahimtar wadannan ra'ayoyi yana taimaka maka ka yi tunani mai zurfi kan manufar tattalin arziki.
hausa.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Kasuwanni sun fara daga cikakkiyar gasa (masu sayarwa da yawa, kayayyaki iri daya) zuwa mallakar kai (mai sayarwa daya, kaya na musamman). Danna kowanne don kara koyo:
hausa.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Jimillar Kayayyakin Cikin Gida yana auna jimillar darajar dukkan kayayyaki da ayyuka na karshe da aka samar a cikin iyakokin kasa a shekara guda. Ga Amurka, ana raba shi haka:
hausa.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Yayin da farashi ↑, adadin da ake bukata ↓. Mabukata suna saye kadan lokacin da farashi ke hawa. Layin bukata na sauka.
hausa.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Yayin da farashi ↑, adadin da ake samarwa ↑. Masu samarwa suna yin kari lokacin da farashi ke da yawa. Layin wadata na hawa.
hausa.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Inda wadata ke haduwa da bukata. Wannan «E» na saita farashin kasuwa (P*) da adadi (Q*) ta atomatik.
hausa.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Canza farashi motsi ne tare da layi. Abubuwan waje (fasaha, kudin shiga, zabi) suna sauya dukkan layin.
hausa.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Bukata ta koma dama — mutane da yawa suna son wannan kaya (watakila kudin shiga ya hau, ko wani yanayi ya sa ya shahara). Wannan yana kara farashin daidaito da adadi duka biyu.
hausa.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Bukata ta koma hagu — mutane kadan suna son wannan kaya (madadi ya zama arha, ko zabi ya canja). Farashi da adadi duka suna sauka.
hausa.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Wadata ta koma dama — masu samarwa za su iya yin arha (sabuwar fasaha, karancin farashin shigarwa). Farashi na sauka, amma adadi na hawa.
hausa.supply_shifted_left_production_became_: ▶ Wadata ta koma hagu — samarwa ta zama mai wuya (bala'in halitta, dokoki). Farashi na hawa, amma adadi na sauka.
hausa.measures_how_much_quantity_demanded_ch: yana auna nawa adadin da ake bukata ke canjawa lokacin da farashi ke canjawa.
hausa.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: kayayyaki (kayan alatu, kayayyaki masu madadi) suna ganin babban raguwa a bukata da karamin karin farashi.
hausa.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: kayayyaki (bukatu kamar magani, man fetur) suna rike da bukata mai tsayawa ba tare da la'akari da farashi ba.
hausa.revenue_unchanged_by_price: Kudin shiga ba ya canja da farashi
hausa.apply_scenario_to_graph: ✅ Yi amfani da yanayi ga jadawali
hausa.build_equity_but_mortgage_maintenance: Gina daraja, amma jinginar gida + kulawa
hausa.investment_allocation_of_annual_salary: 📊 Rabon jari (% na albashin shekara da aka saka)
hausa.investment_percent_of_salary: Kaso na albashi da aka saka
hausa.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Bayyana wace irin kasuwa kake son yin ciniki a ciki. AI zai kirkiri kamfanoni 5 na kirkira masu kudade na hakika.
hausa.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: misali «kamfanonin farawa na makamashi mai sabuntawa», «kamfanonin wasanni», «masana'antar sararin samaniya», ko bar wofi don gauraya...
hausa.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Sake saita kasuwa da kirkirar sabbin kamfanoni
hausa.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Buga kowane ra'ayin kasuwanci kuma AI zai kirkiri farashin farawa, kudade na yau da kullun, da farashi. Sannan ka gudanar da shi kwana zuwa kwana!
hausa.e_g_food_truck_dog_walking_tutoring_ba: misali motar abinci, tafiya da kare, koyarwa, gasar burodi, kirkirar manhaja...
hausa.gdp_contracting_unemployment_climbing_: GDP na raguwa. Rashin aikin yi na hawa. Jimillar bukata bai isa ba.
hausa.rare_and_ugly_high_inflation_low_growt: Da wuya kuma munana: babbar hauhawar farashi + karancin ci gaba. Misalin girgizar OPEC na shekarun 1970. Yana da wuya a gyara.
hausa.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Ci gaba na da karfi amma hauhawar farashi na tashi. Babban bankin na iya danna birki da karfi.
hausa.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP na sama, hauhawar farashi an shawo kai. Yanki mai kyau — mai dorewa a yanzu.
hausa.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Karamin tasiri na tsabta. Lefofin manufa suna soke juna kusan.
hausa.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Motsa lefofi hudu na manufa (haraji, kashe kudin gwamnati, yawan riba, harajin kwastam). Yi hasashen yanayin macro kafin karanta shi. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Hasashenka (a rayuwa ta hakika, wace lefa masana tattalin arziki suka fi jayayya a kanta? Me ya sa?)
hausa.e_g_tariffs_hit_prices_fast_but_the_gd: misali, harajin kwastam yana shafar farashi da sauri, amma tasiri kan GDP ya dogara da ramuwar gayya...
hausa.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Na makale — Nuna tambayoyi a bude
hausa.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Wace gaurayawa ce ke haifar da «tsayuwar-hauhawa»? Me ya sa ta kasance mai zafi ta siyasa sosai a shekarun 1970?
hausa.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Rage haraji da kashe kudin gwamnati duka suna karfafa GDP. Wanne ke samar da karin hauhawar farashi ga kowace dala ta karfafawa? Me ya sa?
hausa.when_would_a_central_bank_deliberately: Yaushe babban banki zai haifar da koma baya da gangan? (Volcker 1979-82.)
hausa.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: Shin harajin kwastam yana taimaka wa ma'aikatan cikin gida na dogon lokaci, ko yana kara farashi ga kowa? Duka biyu? Ina sassaucin yake?
hausa.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Wannan kayan aiki ya kulle alamun Keynes na littafi. A tattalin arzikin bangaren wadata, wace alama ce ke juyawa? A karkashin MMT? A karkashin sabon tattalin arzikin gargajiya (tsammani na hankali)? Ina modelin Keynes ke ba da alama mara kyau idan aka kwatanta da bayanan duniya na hakika?
hausa.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Zan iya bayyana dalilin da ya sa wannan gaurayen manufa ke haifar da wannan yanayin tattalin arziki na macro.
hausa.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Kayan aikin bincike — babu maki, babu bayyanawa, babu zubar amsa. Kimar lambobi kiyasi ne na ilimi, ba ainihin modelin macro ba; amsoshi na hakika sun dogara da tsarin kudi, karfin da ba a amfani da shi, tsammani, da cinikin waje. Tattalin arzikin macro yana da cece-kuce — masana tattalin arziki sun bambanta kan alama da girma duka biyu.
